Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelsey Kern appeared by zoom for and with Amy Connor (petitioner) in person.
Paul Green appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Pam Cavazos (interpreter) in person.

The interpreter stated for the record: Her name is Pam Cavazos. Her Certification Number is 400002. She has an oath on file with the Court. The language to be interpreted is American Sign Language.

Mrs. Kern stated that she pulled the objections from the website, but she has not been served yet, that the document fails to provide actual allegations that would defend undue influence, that there is no request to validate the will, or that undue influence occurred that would lead to invalidating a will, and that Mr. Green's mother was not married to the decedent. Mr. Green stated that he has been unable to retain counsel, that he and his sister had come to an understanding, and that he is asking that they follow through with it. The court stated that it looked at the will, that it's from 2015, that it's a very short and straight forward document, and that the conversations between Mr. Green and his sister in the last couple of years really have nothing to do with the will from 2015. Mr. Green spoke of conversations he had with his father regarding the estate, of his father having been bedridden, and of his father's inability to update the will. The court is admitting the will over Mr. Green's objections. The court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. the will dated May 18, 2015 is admitted to probate. Amy Conner is appointed as the administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for April 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Paul Green (Stepson/Objector) appeared in person.

The Court stated that the matter was placed on calendar to admit the will. Mr. Greene stated that he was appearing to object, that his father had previously represented that the estate would be split at 50/50, and that he is objecting because the paperwork does not reflect a 50/50 split. Mr. Greene stated that he will be looking to retain counsel.

The Court continued the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary to March 1, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Paul Green's written objections are due on or before February 15, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: H. Singh. Matter not reported.
